The '''''Fa-Loh-Sui''''' was the flagship of the [[Abin-Ral-Xufush]]. It was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] that originally belonged to an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]-based [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] command before the [[Shadow Wing]] seized it. Abin named the ship after his former love interest, [[Fa-Loh-Sui]].
